svg.title: A long parallel timeline of writing, printing, and font engineering
svg.desc: A table-like timeline comparing Chinese and global milestones from early writing to modern digital fonts.
svg.text: A Long Arc Of Type / 字的漫长道路
Writing, printing, and font engineering are all attempts to make form reusable, legible, and trustworthy.
书写、印刷和字体工程不断换工具，但始终在回答同一件事：字形怎样稳定复用，怎样被更多人读到。

g.text: Time / 时间
China and East Asia / 中国与东亚
Europe and Global / 欧洲及其他地区
Why it matters / 对字体的意义
Ancient
先秦至汉
Oracle bones, bronzes, bamboo slips, stone inscriptions
甲骨、金文、竹帛、碑刻让文字进入祭祀、政令和经典
Seal and clerical scripts push writing toward standard forms
Inscriptions, manuscripts, religious and legal records
铭刻、手抄本、宗教和法律文书塑造不同书写传统
Form first becomes a social memory system
字形先服务记忆、权力、学习和信任
Classical
魏晋至唐宋
Regular, running, and cursive scripts mature
楷、行、草成熟，王羲之、欧阳询、颜真卿等成为范本
Calligraphic taste gives later type design a deep source
Manuscript culture and decorated books continue to evolve
手抄传统、装饰书籍和教育制度延续字形训练
Aesthetic judgment comes before font files
现代字体会从书写传统里抽取可复用规律
Tang-Song
唐宋
Woodblock printing stabilizes whole-page reproduction
雕版印刷让经典、经书和图文页面可以长期重印
Many European books still rely on manuscript copying
欧洲手抄本仍占重要位置，复制粒度和速度不同
The page becomes reproducible, but not yet modular
整页稳定了，单字复用还没有完全打开
北宋
Bi Sheng's baked-clay movable type is recorded
毕昇胶泥活字提出可移动字模模型
Gutenberg-style metal type has not yet appeared
欧洲尚未形成 Gutenberg 式金属活字出版系统
A character can become a reusable unit
字从整页图像里分离出来，开始像可调用单元
13th-15th c.
13 至 15 世纪
Wood and metal movable type continue in East Asia
木活字、金属活字继续发展，材料和检字成本变清楚
Gutenberg combines metal type, ink, press, and market
金属活字、油墨、印刷机和出版市场结合起来
Industrial reuse needs tools, material, and distribution
字体不只是一套形状，也是一整条生产链
19th c.
19 世纪
Newspapers, lithography, textbooks
Advertising and telegraph news accelerate printing
报纸、石印、教材、广告和电报新闻推动中文近代印刷
Industrial composition serves newspapers
and commercial printing
机械排版、报业、杂志和商业印刷彼此推动
Type responds to speed, hierarchy, and paper
It also responds to readers and market pressure
字体开始强烈服务速度、栏目、纸张和市场
20th c.
20 世纪
Shanghai type work, Songyi, Heiyi
Wang Xuan's Huaguang laser phototypesetting
上海印刷字体、宋一黑一和王选汉字激光照排接续登场
Phototypesetting, PostScript, TrueType, desktop publishing
照排、PostScript、TrueType 和桌面出版重塑字体文件
Fonts move from physical type to data and output systems
字体离开物理字粒，进入字库、排版软件和输出设备
21st c.
21 世纪
Source Han, system fonts, CJK engineering, AI generation
思源、系统字体、CJK 工程和 AI 字体生成继续扩展边界
Web fonts, variable fonts, programming fonts, open tooling
Web 字体、可变字体、代码字体和开源工具链并行发展
A font becomes source, build, QA, license, and community
字体成为源码、构建、验证、授权和协作共同组成的系统
